requested_action.description: GUA looks at LO. No laptop. No terminal. No protocol document. Just eye contact. 'Gua butuh lo,' he says. 'Bukan sebagai co-author. Bukan sebagai system administrator. Gua takut. Gua nggak bisa sendiri. Tolong jangan pergi.' No code metaphor. No reframing. Just the raw thing, spoken aloud.
